caption: A woman with short dark hair and black-rimmed glasses is speaking against a solid black background. She is wearing a light green, long-sleeved top featuring delicate floral embroidery in red and white around the neckline. A small black lapel microphone is clipped to the front of her garment, and she wears a dark necklace. In the bottom left corner of the frames, a circular logo featuring the text "NPTEL" is visible. As the sequence progresses, the woman continues to speak, with subtle shifts in her facial expression and the movement of her mouth. Her head remains centered, and her posture stays relatively still throughout the clip. The lighting is consistent across the scenes, focusing on her face and upper torso while leaving the surrounding environment entirely dark.
